app.name: VertexAgent
app.tagline: AI agent running purely in your browser
app.sendHint: Send a message to get started

chat.clickToStart: Click + to start a new chat

message.inputHint: Enter to send, {modifier}+Enter for new line

generalSettings.title: General Settings
generalSettings.nicknamePlaceholder: Enter a nickname for the assistant...
generalSettings.nicknameHint: This name will be displayed as the assistant's name in conversations.

llmSettings.title: LLM Configuration
llmSettings.desc: Configure your LLM provider, API key, and model.
llmSettings.apiKeySaved: API key is saved. Leave empty to keep the current key.
llmSettings.modelsHint: Enter your API key and click refresh to load models from the provider.
llmSettings.baseUrlHint: Leave empty to use the default endpoint.
llmSettings.baseUrlRequiredHint: Enter the base URL of your OpenAI-compatible API endpoint (e.g. http://localhost:11434/v1).

agentSettings.title: Agent Hosts
agentSettings.desc: Manage agent servers for tool execution. Connected agents can run shell commands on remote or local machines.
agentSettings.empty: No agents configured. Add one below or start a local agent server.
agentSettings.hint: Enter the host URL of an agent server. The server will print a connect token to its console for authentication.
agentSettings.connectFailed: Could not connect. Make sure the agent server is running.

appearanceSettings.title: Appearance
appearanceSettings.desc: Choose your preferred theme for the interface.

dataSettings.title: Data Management
dataSettings.desc: Export all your chats and settings to a zip file, or import a previously exported backup.
dataSettings.exportDesc: Download all chats, messages, and config as a zip file.
dataSettings.importDesc: Restore chats and config from a previously exported zip file. This will overwrite existing data.
dataSettings.importSuccess: Import completed. Please reload the page to apply changes.
dataSettings.factoryResetDesc: Erase all chats, LLM settings, and files. This action cannot be undone.
dataSettings.factoryResetConfirm: Are you sure? This will permanently delete all your data.

languageSettings.title: Language
languageSettings.desc: Choose the display language for the interface.
languageSettings.label: Display Language

errors.noLLMConfigured: Please configure an LLM provider in Settings.
errors.noLLMConfiguredDetail: No LLM provider configured yet. Please open Settings (gear icon) to add your API key and select a provider.
errors.noLLMProvider: No LLM provider configured. Please set up a provider in Settings.
errors.apiKeyNotSet: API key not set for {provider}. Please add your key in Settings.
errors.serverNoToken: Server did not return a token.

filemanage.title: File Manager
filemanage.empty: No files yet. Upload files to get started.
filemanage.dropHint: or drag and drop files here
filemanage.uploadRemoteError: Failed to upload file to remote
filemanage.confirmDeleteFile: Are you sure you want to delete '{name}'?
filemanage.confirmDeleteDir: Are you sure you want to delete folder '{name}' and all its contents?
filemanage.loadRemoteError: Failed to load remote files. Make sure the agent server is running and connected.
filemanage.remoteEmpty: No files in the remote working directory (.vertex-agent)
filemanage.remoteHint: Files are shown from the .vertex-agent directory.
filemanage.remoteOperationNotSupported: This operation is not supported for remote files
